# Pull request checklist

Thanks for contributing to KoCut.

Before submitting:

- [ ] I ran `python -m pytest`
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated README, CHANGELOG, ROADMAP, or docs when needed
- [ ] I did not commit private media, client data, patient data, API keys, or local machine paths
- [ ] I considered security risks around file paths, subprocess calls, and exported files

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change.

## Notes

Add any migration notes, known limitations, or follow-up tasks.
